summary: Java 11 foi a primeira LTS pós-Java 8, entregou HTTP Client final, var em lambdas, ZGC experimental, Epsilon GC e iniciou o fim de Applets e Java Web Start.

jeps.title: Nest-Based Access Control
jeps.description: Formaliza nest mates no bytecode, evitando bridge methods para acesso a private de inner classes.

jeps.title: Dynamic Class-File Constants
jeps.description: Entrada de constant pool CONSTANT_Dynamic para constantes resolvidas dinamicamente.

jeps.title: Epsilon: A No-Op Garbage Collector
jeps.description: GC que não coleta — útil para benchmarks e apps de vida curta.

jeps.title: Remove the Java EE and CORBA Modules
jeps.description: Remove módulos Java EE (JAX-WS, JAXB etc.) e CORBA — agora externos.

jeps.title: HTTP Client (Standard)
jeps.description: Final! HttpClient no pacote java.net.http — cliente HTTP/2 moderno nativo.

jeps.title: Local-Variable Syntax for Lambda Parameters
jeps.description: Permite var em lambda parameters: (var x, var y) -> x + y.

jeps.title: Key Agreement with Curve25519 and Curve448
Flight Recorder
jeps.description: Java Flight Recorder (JFR) open-sourced — perfilamento de baixo overhead.

jeps.title: Launch Single-File Source-Code Programs
jeps.description: java Hello.java executa sem compilar — ótimo para scripts.

jeps.title: Low-Overhead Heap Profiling
jeps.description: Heap profiling de baixo overhead via JVMTI.

jeps.title: Transport Layer Security (TLS) 1.3
jeps.description: Suporte a TLS 1.3 — handshake mais rápido e mais seguro.

jeps.title: ZGC: A Scalable Low-Latency Garbage Collector (Experimental)
Deprecate the Pack200 Tools and API
